news.title:
Voltas Ltd appoints Ms. Pragya Bijalwan to Senior Leadership Team effective 6th April 2026.
Bijalwan, with 20+ years' experience, has held roles at Crompton, Castrol, AkzoNobel, and HPCL.
news.summary:
Voltas Ltd appoints Ms. Pragya Bijalwan to Senior Leadership Team effective 6th April 2026.
Bijalwan, with 20+ years' experience, has held roles at Crompton, Castrol, AkzoNobel, and HPCL.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirms ratings for Voltas citing strong credit profile, leadership, and robust financials.
JV losses noted but breakeven expected by FY27; stable outlook due to liquidity and order book.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirms ratings for Voltas citing strong credit profile, leadership, and robust financials.
JV losses noted but breakeven expected by FY27; stable outlook due to liquidity and order book.

news.title: Motilal Oswal assigns Neutral rating to Voltas; CMP at Rs 1270.3 as of Mar 30.
news.summary: Motilal Oswal assigns Neutral rating to Voltas; CMP at Rs 1270.3 as of Mar 30.

news.title:
Customs issued a ₹23.5 cr demand notice against Voltas for alleged import misclassification.
Voltas is reviewing the order and may appeal before CESTAT, as per regulatory filing.
news.summary:
Customs issued a ₹23.5 cr demand notice against Voltas for alleged import misclassification.
Voltas is reviewing the order and may appeal before CESTAT, as per regulatory filing.

news.title:
Voltas faces Rs 10.76 cr duty demand, Rs 12.76 cr penalty for misclassification.
The period in question spans June 2019 to July 2022; no material financial impact expected.
news.summary:
Voltas faces Rs 10.76 cr duty demand, Rs 12.76 cr penalty for misclassification.
The period in question spans June 2019 to July 2022; no material financial impact expected.

news.title:
Blue Star, Voltas, Havells surge up to 5% after PG Electroplast resolves LPG supply issues.
Blue Star trades 5% higher at ₹1,747.4; Voltas gains 4.5% at ₹1,360.5; Havells rises 4.2% to ₹1,285.8.
news.summary:
Blue Star, Voltas, Havells surge up to 5% after PG Electroplast resolves LPG supply issues.
Blue Star trades 5% higher at ₹1,747.4; Voltas gains 4.5% at ₹1,360.5; Havells rises 4.2% to ₹1,285.8.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.

news.title:
Weak rupee, West Asia conflict raise input costs, prompting price hikes by appliance makers like LG, Voltas.
AC prices rose 10-15%, other appliances up 5%. FMCG firms face 15-20% input inflation, broader hikes possible.
news.summary:
Weak rupee, West Asia conflict raise input costs, prompting price hikes by appliance makers like LG, Voltas.
AC prices rose 10-15%, other appliances up 5%. FMCG firms face 15-20% input inflation, broader hikes possible.

news.title:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Mid, smallcap indices plunged; Nifty Midcap 100 fell 3.5% and Nifty Smallcap 100 dropped 3.8%.
Stocks like Muthoot Finance, Voltas, SAIL, Paytm, and Firstcry declined over 5% amid global geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
TTK Prestige and Stove Kraft rose up to 6.6% on gas supply concerns after Israel's strike on Iran's South Pars gas field.
Shares of Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals fell, while analysts see growth potential in induction cookers amid LPG disruption.
news.summary:
TTK Prestige and Stove Kraft rose up to 6.6% on gas supply concerns after Israel's strike on Iran's South Pars gas field.
Shares of Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals fell, while analysts see growth potential in induction cookers amid LPG disruption.

news.title: Voltas faces GST inspection in Mumbai; operations remain unaffected.
news.summary: Voltas faces GST inspection in Mumbai; operations remain unaffected.

news.title:
Voltas reports inspection by State Tax Assistant Commissioner's Office.
Company states no major impact on financials or operations.
news.summary:
Voltas reports inspection by State Tax Assistant Commissioner's Office.
Company states no major impact on financials or operations.

news.title:
Heatwave drives shares of Blue Star, Voltas, Havells up 5% as AC demand rises.
Blue Star launched 125 AC models, including energy-efficient and antivirus tech ACs.
news.summary:
Heatwave drives shares of Blue Star, Voltas, Havells up 5% as AC demand rises.
Blue Star launched 125 AC models, including energy-efficient and antivirus tech ACs.

news.title:
Axis Capital reports Voltas saw 11% volume rise after a 9-month decline.
El Niño heat wave expected to boost cooling product demand and market share.
news.summary:
Axis Capital reports Voltas saw 11% volume rise after a 9-month decline.
El Niño heat wave expected to boost cooling product demand and market share.

news.title:
Voltas aims for double-digit growth in summer, driven by normal temperature trends.
The company plans price hikes of 5-15% due to rising costs and revised energy norms.
news.summary:
Voltas aims for double-digit growth in summer, driven by normal temperature trends.
The company plans price hikes of 5-15% due to rising costs and revised energy norms.

news.title:
Voltas forecasts 25% growth in AC sales due to early summer demand.
Favourable weather conditions are driving the rise in cooling product demand.
news.summary:
Voltas forecasts 25% growth in AC sales due to early summer demand.
Favourable weather conditions are driving the rise in cooling product demand.

news.title: Voltas plans to raise AC prices by 5-15%, reports Zee Business.
news.summary: Voltas plans to raise AC prices by 5-15%, reports Zee Business.

news.title:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.
news.summary:
Indian consumer durables sector faces challenges despite GST cuts, including shorter festivals and La Nina effects.
Policy and unexpected external factors hinder growth for companies like Voltas, Whirlpool, and Bajaj Electricals.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.

news.title:
Voltas Ltd announces resignation of Mr. Gyan Shanker Pandey, Head-Digital, effective 13th February 2026.
Resignation attributed to pursuit of opportunities outside Voltas; company assures smooth transition process.
news.summary:
Voltas Ltd announces resignation of Mr. Gyan Shanker Pandey, Head-Digital, effective 13th February 2026.
Resignation attributed to pursuit of opportunities outside Voltas; company assures smooth transition process.
